item.title: AAN 2026 Data Highlights
item.description:
• Summary: At the American Academy of Neurology (AAN) 2026 conference, Johnson & Johnson, Kyverna Therapeutics, Capricor Therapeutics, and Praxis Precision Medicines presented practice-changing data from clinical trials across various neurological conditions. The data showcased novel therapies and significant efficacy results.
  • MoAs: J&J: monoclonal antibodies for neurodegenerative diseases; Kyverna: autologous CAR-T cell therapy targeting B cells in neuroinflammatory disorders; Capricor: allogeneic cardiosphere-derived cells for muscular dystrophy; Praxis: small molecule sodium channel blockers and GABAA receptor modulators for epilepsy.
  • Sources: BioSpace
